data.title: PVH to release earnings report; EPS expected at $1.99. Past performance shows share price drop after exceeding estimates. PVH's stock trading at $79.87, down 23.27% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate PVH as Neutral with $95.82 one-year price target for a potential 19.97% upside.
data.description: PVH (NYSE: PVH) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on 2025-08-26, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.99. Investors are eager to see if PVH will surpass estimates and provide positive guidance for the next quarter. Past performance shows that beating EPS estimates doesn't guarantee a positive market reaction, as evidenced by a 17.96% drop in share price after a previous beat. Shares of PVH were trading at $79.87 as of August 22, with a 52-week period that saw a 23.27% decline. Analysts' consensus rating for PVH is Neutral, with an average one-year price target of $95.82 suggesting a potential 19.97% upside. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Community Options appoints Derek Shive as Regional Director in Pennsylvania; leading nonprofit supporting disabilities.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania on August 25, 2025, Community Options, a prominent national nonprofit aiding individuals with disabilities, revealed the selection of Derek Shive as the Regional Director for Central Pennsylvania. This strategic move coincides with recent developments within the organization.

data.title: NORTIV 8 marks 9th anniversary by launching Armadillo 3 and expanding across hiking and work gear, celebrating innovation.
data.description: For 9 years and counting, NORTIV 8, the reputable American brand for outdoor and work footwear, continues to push boundaries. On its 9th anniversary, the brand unveils an impressive new collection that sets new standards for comfort and durability. This brand, beloved by millions, remains dedicated to innovation and quality in its products.

data.title: Bohemia Interactive Simulations chosen by Canadian Army for advanced digital training; awarded five-year contract.
data.description: A company known as Bohemia Interactive Simulations (BISim), which is a subsidiary of BAE Systems, Inc., recently secured a significant contract from the Canadian Department of National Defense. This five-year enterprise license agreement is aimed at providing the Digital Virtual Trainer (DVT). The contract indicates a strong commitment for the development of simulation technology in the defense sector, with potential positive outcomes for both parties involved.

data.title: Haloid Solutions to sell ambulances under $150,000, partnering with cost-driven manufacturers for public safety agencies.
data.description: In New York on August 25, 2025, Haloid Solutions announced its commitment to offering competitive prices on emergency vehicles for public safety organizations and government agencies. They are venturing into the ambulance market through collaborations with manufacturers focused on cost efficiency, aiming to deliver value to customers through affordable options.

data.title: Long John Silver's adds variety to $6 basket lineup, offering more options for guests at affordable prices.
data.description: Visitors to Louisville, Kentucky can now indulge in a wider range of delectable options without worrying about their wallets. Long John Silver's® is catering to cost-conscious customers by expanding their menu selection with added treasures at unbeatable prices. This initiative seeks to provide guests with more variety and value for their money, reinforcing the brand's commitment to delivering delicious flavors without the hefty price tag. As of August 25, 2025, patrons can savor these budget-friendly delights and experience a true culinary adventure without breaking the bank.

data.title: 2G Energy Inc. partners with CK Power to launch new Demand Response Generator in North America.
data.description: 2G Energy Inc., the North American branch of the worldwide leader in combined heat and power systems, 2G Energy AG based in Heek, Germany, has revealed a new collaboration with CK Power from St. Louis. The partnership is set to enhance their capabilities in the industry. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025.

data.title: LG unveils new top-load washers at Clean Show 2025, targeting US commercial laundry market growth. LG believed to be fastest-growing player in industry.
data.description: LG Electronics USA, a leading appliance brand in America, recently showcased their latest series of top-load washers at The Clean Show 2025 in Orlando, Florida on August 25, 2025. The company, recognized as the top player in the U.S. commercial laundry market, is known for its reliability. LG demonstrated its commitment to innovation and growth, solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Global AI Voice Generator Market to reach $20.4 billion by 2030 with a 37.1% CAGR growth, led by IBM, NVIDIA, and OpenAI.
data.description: The global AI Voice Generator Market is projected to increase from USD 3.0 billion in 2024 to USD 20.4 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 37.1% during the forecast period. Factors such as government initiatives, development in deep learning algorithms, and the growing need for personalized customer experiences are driving this growth. Some key statistics include 418 Tables, 67 Figures, and 451 Pages in the report. Key driving factors include the increasing demand for voice-enabled devices, advancements in NLP and machine learning technologies, and the growing need for accessibility solutions in digital content. However, challenges such as the lack of explainability in AI decision-making processes for audio generation and the high cost of developing advanced generative AI solutions may hinder market growth. Opportunities lie in integrating gen AI with emerging technologies like 5G and edge computing, and the increasing demand for localized content and multilingual support in global markets. Top companies in the market include IBM, NVIDIA, OpenAI, Meta, Microsoft, Google, AWS, Cisco, SoundHound, and Speechify.

data.title: Clongen Labs launches Clongen Pharma in March 2026 to develop targeted cancer therapeutics. Based in GAITHERSBURG, Md. as per PRNewswire on Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: A newly established company will concentrate on creating innovative, precise cancer treatments. Clongen Laboratories, LLC, based in GAITHERSBURG, Md., made this announcement on Aug. 25, 2025, via PRNewswire. The company, known for its molecular diagnostic services for infectious diseases and its work as a contract research organization in the biotechnology sector, is shifting its focus to developing targeted cancer therapeutics.

data.title: Way platform powers ancillary & loyalty experiences for Hyatt by integrating into digital ecosystem & loyalty program.
data.description: Today, Way, a top-notch experiential platform for major enterprise brands, revealed its integration into Hyatt's digital ecosystem in Austin, Texas on August 25, 2025. This integration will link experiences and additional services to the World of Hyatt loyalty program.

data.title: Hollyland brings over 30 global creators to China for a 5-day tech-culture tour, aiming to unite cultures.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on August 25, 2025, Hollyland is hosting the WeConnect 2025 brand day celebration by inviting over 30 global creators to China for a five-day tour. This initiative aims to foster cultural unity through technology and creativity. Over the last seven years, Hollyland has been actively promoting this goal.

data.title: Fi launches Fi Mini™, smallest pet tracker for dogs & cats. Weighs 0.56 ounces, costs less than $12/month, full-featured GPS tracker.
data.description: Fi, a prominent smart pet technology company based in New York, has introduced Fi Mini™, an innovative GPS and health tracker for pets. Weighing only 0.56 ounces, this device can be attached to any collar or harness to provide a comprehensive safety system for dogs and cats. Priced at less than $12 per month, including hardware costs, the Fi Mini is the lightest and most intelligent tracker available. It offers full-featured GPS and cellular tracking, making it the most affordable option in the market currently. The Fi Mini shares similar advanced features as its predecessor.

data.title: Core Spaces partners with Talkspace to provide free mental health services to 30,000 residents, marking a groundbreaking initiative in the student housing sector starting September 2, 2025.
data.description: Core Spaces, a real estate developer, operator, and investment manager, has partnered with Talkspace, an online behavioral healthcare company, to provide free mental health services for 30,000 residents across the country from September 2, 2025. This collaboration marks a significant step in the student housing industry by incorporating professional mental health assistance into the resident experience. The initiative aims to enhance the well-being of residents by offering on-demand mental health resources.
